Meta.title: Lederer Elastic Yarns | Tradition. Innovation. Quality.
Meta.description: Jörg Lederer GmbH – Your specialist for elastic yarns since 1948. High-quality wrapped and air-jet yarns for hosiery, compression articles and technical textiles. Made in Germany.

About.title: Tradition and passion
About.description: Our medium-sized family business based in Amstetten has over 75 years of experience in yarn manufacturing. With approximately 130 employees, we develop and produce products used in high-quality stockings and tights as well as in compression bandages from renowned manufacturers.

Products.title: Our Products
Products.subtitle: An impressive variety of yarns in the highest quality
Products.wrappedDesc: Single and double cover – for hosiery, compression and technical textiles
Products.airjetDesc: Economical elastic yarns through innovative air-jet technology
Products.elastotwistDesc: Modern hollow spindle twisting machines for weaving yarns from diverse fiber materials

Careers.title: Become part of our story
Careers.subtitle: A reliable and secure employer in the textile industry since 1948
Careers.benefit1Desc: A stable employer for over 75 years
Careers.benefit2Desc: Discounted membership at the fitness center
Careers.benefit4Desc: Low turnover and strong team cohesion
Careers.benefit5Desc: State-of-the-art technology in a traditional industry
